Venue Info
Media Gallery
Charlotte Coliseum
Charlotte, NC
Seating Capacity: 24500
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 1
  DMB  (1)

Longest Performance:
12.28.95 - Jimi Thing (14:30)
Description
Charlotte Coliseum was the home of the Charlotte Hornets until the team moved to New Orleans in 2002 and is now the home of the Charlotte Sting (WNBA).
